body:
Er hat jeden Brief aufbewahrt, den ich ihm einst schrieb, und nun führt das Schicksal ihn zurück, um das einzufordern, was immer ihm hätte gehören sollen 🖤💌🔥.

Kapitel 1
POV Harper

Die blauen Flecken auf meinen Armen pochten unter dem schwarzen Seidenkleid, fünf perfekte Fingerabdrücke dort, wo Weston mich letzte Nacht gepackt hatte. „Du wirst mich nie wieder blamieren, Harper.“ Seine Worte hallten noch nach, während ich mich tiefer in die Ecke des Silvercrest-Ballsaals drückte und das Rudel beim Feiern beobachtete – als würde ich in Zeitlupe ertrinken.

Im Laufe der Jahre hatte ich mich so sehr an diese Art von Unsichtbarkeit gewöhnt, daran, mich kleiner und stiller zu machen, daran, dass Selbstverteidigung nur noch mehr Grausamkeit bringt… Vielleicht ist das das Ergebnis jahrelangen Has
title: Weiter lesen ➡️

body: “Tell me to leave,” he said. “Or I’ll claim you.” He was supposed to be in bed with his new Luna. Instead, he was in my room, shaking from rut and hunger 🔥. Said he couldn’t touch her. Said every time he tried, he smelled me instead. I know this is wrong. I know this will ruin everything. But when an Alpha in rut looks at you like you’re the only thing that can save him… you don’t choose safety. You choose chaos 😈❤️‍🔥.  Chapter 1 POV Morgan "If you ruin this night, cousin, what father did to you yesterday will feel like a caress." Sarah's manicured nails dig crescents into my wrist, right where yesterday's bruises have barely begun to yellow. The bruises beneath my servant uniform pulse with fresh agony when she presses her body against mine, deliberately, knowingly. She knows exactly wher

Chapter 1
Back then, I spent all my savings hoarding supplies.

But in the end, my mom and my younger sister, Jemma Graham, pushed me out into the snow, where I froze to death.

It was all because the guy Jemma had a crush on said a few words to me.

This time, I wasted no time awakening my spatial ability. I emptied the house overnight, not leaving any food for those ungrateful people.

When the apocalypse hit, I watched from behind the security cameras as Jemma excitedly let that jerk into our home.

By the seventh day, the stash in the warehouse was so jaw-dropping that it left them absolutely stunned.

*****

My cheek was on fire.

Jemma's voice dripped with contempt. "Mom, look at her! She's rambling on about the end of the world again, blowing all our cash!

"How many times do I have
